name: Bolt Financial
description: Bolt Financial — One-click checkout and payment platform for e-commerce merchants focused on reducing cart abandonment.

seo.title: Bolt Financial — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Bolt Financial: Bolt Financial — One-click checkout and payment platform for e-commerce merchants focused on reducing cart abandonment.

when_to_use: One-click checkout to reduce cart abandonment on e-commerce stores
Shared network login for returning shoppers across Bolt merchant sites
Embedded checkout widget with saved payment methods for DTC brands
Reducing checkout friction for high-AOV retail and fashion merchants

cons: Past controversies on claims and culture
review.verdict: Checkout conversion tool worth testing, but claims warrant scrutiny and migration cost is real.
review.best_for: Mid-market US e-commerce wanting shared checkout identity network
review.not_for: Merchants prioritizing transparent pricing and minimal vendor lock-in
